title: Bardo
description: The intermediate state between death and rebirth in Tibetan Buddhism. Three bardos: the Chikhai Bardo (moment of death, clear light), the Chonyid Bardo (experiencing the peaceful and wrathful deities), and the Sidpa Bardo (seeking rebirth). The bardo is a period of heightened perception where the soul encounters its own karma directly, without the buffer of the physical body.
